title: lechea minor var. maritima
intro: Lechea minor var. maritima, also known as dwarf pineland gay feather or seaside pineland gay feather, is a variety of the Lechea minor plant, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. Traditionally, Lechea minor var. maritima has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The medicinal properties of this plant are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Lechea minor var. maritima can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to support the healing of minor cuts and scrapes.
